creator: d9364104@mail.nchu.edu.tw
text:
I got "linux/kd.h" not found error! while compiling multimedia/mplayer or multimedia/mencoder at file vo_directfb2.c.
After investigated the file is included in graphics/svgalib, but graphics/svgalib is for i386 only.

How-To-Repeat: Compile multimedia/mplayer or multimedia/mencoder from ports.
